title: Draft approval must remain separate from live social approval
lesson: For AG Digitalz social content workflows, approved_draft means the content can be treated as reviewed draft material only. It must not be interpreted as permission to connect accounts, schedule, post, use analytics APIs, trigger DMs/comments, activate n8n, or store credentials.
whyThisMatters: It prevents a reviewed content draft from being mistaken for approval to publish, schedule, connect accounts, or run live automations.
whenToUse: Use during content review, owner approval package preparation, target PR review, and pre-live social connector gate checks.
whenNotToUse: Do not treat this candidate as accepted memory or permission to post, schedule, connect accounts, use analytics APIs, store credentials, or activate automations.
notes: Candidate-only lesson. It must not be loaded as accepted truth unless owner-approved in a future promotion workflow.
